column11: 1630: Took departure Cape Henlopen Lt brg WSW dist 6 mi.
1800: Five Fathom LS brg ExS1/2S dist 4 mi (maybe 8)
0215: Barnegat Lighthouse brg W dist 10 mi.
0845: Passed Sandy Hook Lt, proceeded to Navy Yard.
0740: Got Underway. Steamed down the river.
0715: Got Underway. Proceeded down the bay.
2000: Changed 29.90 to 30.10. I suspect he wrote the value as 0.10 below 300 instead of 0.10 above 30.
Noon: The noon DR Long is 36 01W.
1000: Ignoring Baro readings of 29.25 at 1000 and 1200.
This position is 51 miles to the northwest of the port.
Note: Find an error in Chronometer. (This note was written on the log page.)
0900: Took departure from Fayal brg SWxW1/2W dist 8 mi.
1025: NW Pt of St Georges Id brg SxW dist 5 (or 50) mi.
1300: W end Gracioca brg SSW dist 41/2 mi.
